headline: Bank of America (BAC) Says Lower Income Spending Is Closing The Consumer Gap
summary: Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) card data points to a shift in U.S. consumer spending patterns, with lower income households closing the gap with higher income groups. The data suggests the previously discussed K shaped economy is fading as blue collar job growth supports spending at the lower end of the income spectrum. This development affects how Bank of America assesses consumer credit risk, loan demand, and its broader view of the U.S. economy. For investors watching Bank of America, this...

headline: Where Will Amazon Stock Be In 2 Years?
summary: Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN) just posted a blowout quarter Q1 2026 EPS of $2.78 beat consensus by 60.69%, AWS reaccelerated to 28% growth, the fastest in 15 quarters, and chips business crossed a $20 billion annual run rate growing triple digits. Yet shares trade at $244.39, flat for the year. Can this stock reach $400 by 2028, ... Where Will Amazon Stock Be In 2 Years?

headline: Congress Set to Ban Digital Dollar. What It Means for Crypto Stocks.
summary: The central bank digital currency ban has been a longtime goal of conservatives and some advocates in the crypto industry who don’t want the government to issue a cryptocurrency that competes with stablecoins.

headline: BofA now sees no Fed rate cuts until 2028
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America has shifted its Federal Reserve outlook, now forecasting three interest rate hikes totaling 75 basis points this year before an extended pause, pushing any prospect of rate cuts well into the future.

headline: Aluminum’s War Shock Blunted by Dark Transits and Chinese Supply
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The Iran war caused one of the biggest supply shocks to ever hit the aluminum market, but the runaway price surge that many were bracing for has been blunted by the ingenuity of producers from the Middle East to China.
